events.fact: The player begins a session in the Black Forest with the goal of upgrading bronze items and collecting tin.
The player travels to a secondary base to collect honey after running out.
The player discovers a troll cave in the Black Forest.
The player is killed by a one-star troll after failing a dodge roll.
The player dies a second time while attempting to retrieve their corpse from the troll cave.
The player dies a third time following an encounter with a bear.
The player successfully kills a bear using parry and combo attacks.
The player briefly enters the Mountain biome but retreats due to the freezing debuff.
A troll carrying a tree trunk attacks the player's Black Forest base.
The player dies a fourth time during the troll attack on the base.
The player kills the log-swinging troll and collects troll hide.
The player rebuilds the crafting station, charcoal kiln, and storage destroyed by the troll.
The player uses a portal to return to the main home base.
The player harvests carrots and plants 12 carrot seeds to increase crop yield.
The player slaughters several pigs for meat, leaving three for breeding.
The player upgrades the hoe, hammer, and crafts a troll skin cape.
The player crafts 10 units of bronze at the forge.
The player upgrades the bronze buckler to maximum quality.
